question: When pressure comes from all directions, you tend to?

options.text: Look for a gap so you can keep moving without getting trapped
Focus on completing responsibilities one by one
Try a new approach that has never been done before
Unravel the problem and understand the patterns occurring

question: If you had to choose one thing to maintain in your life, what would you protect most?

options.text: The space to remain myself without many limitations
The things I have held onto for a long time, especially the trust of others
The opportunity to leave behind something different from others
The process of constantly understanding new things and improving myself

question: You see a situation that feels unfair. What are you most likely to do?

options.text: Try to understand all sides before getting involved
Take action if I feel the situation has crossed the line
Try to keep the situation from getting worse
Choose to stay silent, but remember it for the right moment

question: A sudden major change occurs in your life. What are you most likely to do?

options.text: Adjust while looking for the best direction forward
Stand firm on the things I already believe in
Try to take advantage of the situation to open up new possibilities
Take time to understand the situation before making a move

question: In a group, you usually tend to?

options.text: Stay in the background, but make sure everything is running well
Take initiative when needed to keep the team on track
Bring energy to keep the atmosphere alive
Observe the situation and provide input at the right time

question: When something doesn't go as expected, what do you usually do?

options.text: Give myself time, then try again with a different approach
Push myself to get back up and not dwell on it for too long
Continue doing what can be done without showing much emotion
Try to understand what went wrong before taking the next step

question: In interacting with others, you usually?

options.text: Try to understand their feelings before reacting
Maintain relationships consistently, especially with those you trust
Give space so that everyone can still be themselves
Bring a livelier atmosphere when with others

question: If your life feels like it's standing still, what is your reaction?

options.text: Look for a way to break out of the routine
Keep persevering because it's part of the process
Look for something that can make you stand out
Learn new things to open up another path

question: When you have to make a big decision, what do you do most often?

options.text: Consider what feels most right, even if it's hard to explain
Analyze the possibilities before determining a step
Stick to the things you've believed in from the start
Follow the urge to act immediately without hesitating for too long

question: In your life, when do you feel the strongest?

options.text: When I can determine my own path without relying much on others
When I am able to endure even when circumstances are against me
When I dare to take a step despite the high risks
When I understand the situation and know exactly what needs to be done
